languages.original_text: "He has been granted an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the "dummy," as they call him. Yet, the Omnissiah is merciful, having almost entirely divested the Triasomata of both his cognitive and motor functions. He stands in place for days at a time, staring up at the stone visage of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of these... laypeople." {n}Eogunn spits out the last word with anger.{/n}

languages.text: "Ему была предоставлена "почетная" должность на верхних палубах. Высшие офицеры находят его нечленораздельный лепет и блаженную улыбку забавными и пытаются провоцировать "чучелко", как они его называют. Впрочем, Омниссия милостив и лишил Триасомату не только когнитивных, но и почти всех моторных функций. Он сутками стоит на месте, задрав голову на каменный лик Императора, не замечая издевок этих... мирян". {n}Последнее слово Эоганн злобно выплевывает.{/n}

"He has been granted an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the 'dummy,' as they call him. He stands in place for days at a time, staring up at the stone visage of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of the... laypeople." {n}Eogunn spits out the last word with anger.{/n}

Впрочем, Омниссия милостив и лишил Триасомату не только когнитивных, но и почти всех моторных функций. Он сутками стоит на месте, задрав голову на каменный лик Императора, не замечая издевок этих... мирян". {n}Последнее слово Эоганн злобно выплевывает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "He has been given an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the "dummy", as they nickname him. Yet, the Omnissiah is merciful, having divested Triasomata of both his cognitive and almost all motor functions. He stands in place for days, staring up at the stone face of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of these... laypeople." {n}Eogunn angrily spits out the last word.{/n}

"He has been granted an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the 'dummy,' as they call him. Yet the Omnissiah is merciful, having almost entirely divested the Triasomata of both his cognitive and motor functions. He stands in place for days at a time, staring up at the stone visage of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of the... laypeople." {n}Eogunn spits out the last word with anger.{/n}

"He has been given an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. However, the officers do not trust him with any meaningful work. I fear the lack of labour is having a negative effect on his psyche's adaptation to his new body — I have received reports of increased aggression and problems with short-term memory and motor function. The officers are concerned that he will snap at some point, and, sadly, I agree that their concerns are justified. I would like to help, but the subject fears me still."

languages.text: 「彼は甲板の上で名誉職を与えられた。しかし、彼は重要な仕事は任されず、労働の不足が彼の精神に悪影響を与えているのではないかと懸念されている。彼は攻撃的になり、短期記憶や運動機能に問題があるという報告を受けている。彼はいつか暴力を振るうのではないかと心配されている。私はその懸念が正当であると同意している。私は彼を助けることを望んでいるが、彼は私を恐れている」
languages.original_text: "He has been given an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. However, the officers do not trust him with any meaningful work. I fear the lack of labour is having a negative effect on his psyche's adaptation to his new body — I have received reports of increased aggression and problems with short-term memory and motor function. The officers are concerned that he will snap at some point, and, sadly, I agree that their concerns are justified. I would like to help, but the subject fears me still."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は甲板の上で名誉職を与えられた。しかし、彼は重要な仕事は任されず、労働の不足が彼の精神に悪影響を与えているのではないかと懸念されている。彼は攻撃的になり、短期記憶や運動機能に問題があるという報告を受けている。彼はいつか暴力を振るうのではないかと心配されている。私はその懸念が正当であると同意している。私は彼を助けることを望んでいるが、彼は私を恐れている。」

languages.text: “他在上层甲板获得了一个‘荣誉’职位。那些高级军官将他含混不清的呓语和痴傻的微笑视作消遣，总爱去逗弄他们口中的这个‘呆瓜’。然而，欧姆尼赛亚终究是仁慈的，几乎已将这三相体的认知与机能剥夺殆尽。他整日整日地站在原地，仰望着帝皇的石像，对……教外人士的嘲弄全然无动于衷。”{n}伊奥贡愤怒地吐出最后几个字。{/n}
languages.original_text: "He has been granted an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the 'dummy,' as they call him. Yet the Omnissiah is merciful, having almost entirely divested the Triasomata of both his cognitive and motor functions. He stands in place for days at a time, staring up at the stone visage of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of the... laypeople." {n}Eogunn spits out the last word with anger.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “他在上层甲板获得了一个‘荣誉’职位。那些高级军官将他含混不清的呓语和痴傻的微笑视作消遣，总爱去逗弄他们口中的这个‘呆瓜’。然而，欧姆尼赛亚终究是仁慈的，几乎已将这三相体的认知与机能剥夺殆尽。他整日整日地站在原地，仰望着帝皇的石像，对……教外人士的嘲弄全然无动于衷。”{n}伊奥贡愤怒地吐出最后几个字。{/n}

languages.text: « On lui a accordé un poste "honorifique" sur les ponts supérieurs. Les officiers supérieurs trouvent ses marmonnements incohérents et son sourire extatique divertissants et tentent régulièrement de provoquer une réaction chez ce "demeuré", comme ils le surnomment. Pour autant, dans son infinie clémence, l'Omnimessie a presque entièrement privé le Triasomata de ses capacités cognitives comme de ses facultés motrices. Il passe des journées entières à regarder le visage de pierre de l'Empereur sans bouger, parfaitement indifférent aux moqueries de ces... profanes », {n}déclare Eogunn en crachant le dernier mot avec rage.{/n}
languages.original_text: "He has been granted an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the 'dummy,' as they call him. Yet the Omnissiah is merciful, having almost entirely divested the Triasomata of both his cognitive and motor functions. He stands in place for days at a time, staring up at the stone visage of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of the... laypeople." {n}Eogunn spits out the last word with anger.{/n}

Les officiers supérieurs trouvent ses marmonnements incohérents et son sourire extatique divertissants et tentent régulièrement de provoquer une réaction chez ce "demeuré", comme ils le surnomment. Pour autant, dans son infinie clémence, l'Omnimessie a presque entièrement privé le Triasomata de ses capacités cognitives comme de ses facultés motrices. Il passe des journées entières à regarder le visage de pierre de l'Empereur sans bouger, parfaitement indifférent aux moqueries de ces... profanes », {n}déclare Eogunn en crachant le dernier mot avec rage.{/n}

languages.text: «Se le ha concedido un cargo "honorífico" en las cubiertas superiores. Los oficiales de alto rango consideran divertidos sus murmullos incoherentes y su sonrisa feliz, e intentan provocar al "monigote", que es como lo llaman. Pero el Omnissiah es misericordioso, habiendo despojado al triasómata de la mayor parte de sus funciones cognitivas y motoras. Permanece inmóvil durante días, contemplando el rostro del Emperador, ignorando la burla de esos... laicos». {n}Eogunn escupe furioso la última palabra.{/n}
languages.original_text: "He has been granted an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the 'dummy,' as they call him. Yet the Omnissiah is merciful, having almost entirely divested the Triasomata of both his cognitive and motor functions. He stands in place for days at a time, staring up at the stone visage of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of the... laypeople." {n}Eogunn spits out the last word with anger.{/n}

Los oficiales de alto rango consideran divertidos sus murmullos incoherentes y su sonrisa feliz, e intentan provocar al "monigote", que es como lo llaman. Pero el Omnissiah es misericordioso, habiendo despojado al triasómata de la mayor parte de sus funciones cognitivas y motoras. Permanece inmóvil durante días, contemplando el rostro del Emperador, ignorando la burla de esos... laicos». {n}Eogunn escupe furioso la última palabra.{/n}

languages.text: "Üst güvertelerde 'onursal' bir pozisyona yerleştirildi. Üst düzey subaylar onun tutarsız mırıldanmalarını ve mutlu gülümsemesini eğlenceli buluyor. Ona 'kukla' diyor, kışkırtmaya çalışıyorlar. Ancak Hermesih merhametlidir. Üçyeköz'ü hem bilişsel hem de motor işlevlerinden neredeyse tamamen yoksun bırakmıştır. Günlerce aynı yerde durup bu... Sıradan insanların alaylarından tamamen habersiz, İmparator'un taştan yüzüne bakıyor." {n}Eogunn, son kelimeyi öfkeyle tükürüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "He has been granted an 'honorary' position on the upper decks. The high-ranking officers find his incoherent muttering and blissful smile entertaining and try to provoke the 'dummy,' as they call him. Yet the Omnissiah is merciful, having almost entirely divested the Triasomata of both his cognitive and motor functions. He stands in place for days at a time, staring up at the stone visage of the Emperor, utterly oblivious to the mockery of the... laypeople." {n}Eogunn spits out the last word with anger.{/n}

Ona 'kukla' diyor, kışkırtmaya çalışıyorlar. Ancak Hermesih merhametlidir. Üçyeköz'ü hem bilişsel hem de motor işlevlerinden neredeyse tamamen yoksun bırakmıştır. Günlerce aynı yerde durup bu... Sıradan insanların alaylarından tamamen habersiz, İmparator'un taştan yüzüne bakıyor." {n}Eogunn, son kelimeyi öfkeyle tükürüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihm wurde eine 'ehrenhafte' Position auf den oberen Decks gewährt. Die hochrangigen Offiziere finden sein zusammenhangloses Gebrabbel und seliges Lächeln unterhaltsam und versuchen, den 'Dummy', wie sie ihn nennen, zu provozieren. Aber der Omnissiah ist gnädig und hat den Triasomata fast vollständig seiner kognitiven und motorischen Fähigkeiten beraubt. Er starrt oft tagelang auf das steinerne Abbild des Imperators und ignoriert den Spott der ... Laien." {n}Das letzte Wort spuckt Eogunn wütend aus.{/n}
